title: tellima australis
intro: Tellima australis, also known as Australian false heath or fringe cups, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tellima australis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Tellima australis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
